TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ulay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 45 buwan, 210 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 204 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 95%, Bunun 1%, saySiyat 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%.
S.PHON: alaŇč ulaj …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu nańßuj …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, ő≤unun *%, s~…ēajs~…ēijat *.*%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *.*%.
S.FORM: alang Ulay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 45 buwan, 210 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 204 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 95%, Bunun 1%, saySiyat 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%.
